ticket_text: You charged my credit card twice for the same subscription this month. I need this fixed immediately.
I cannot log into my account anymore. Password reset emails never arrive and I have a deadline today.
The export button on the dashboard crashes the browser every time I click it in Chrome.
Please add dark mode to the mobile app. Many users in our org have requested this feature.
What are your business hours for phone support? I prefer calling instead of email.
My invoice is wrong and I was overcharged last week.
agent_response: I am sorry this happened. I have opened billing case #7721 and you will receive a corrected invoice within 24 hours.

turns.content: The app freezes when I open settings.
Please try clearing cache and updating to version 2.4. I will follow up tomorrow if it persists.

gold_summary: Customer reports the app freezing in settings. Agent asked them to clear cache and update to version 2.4 and offered follow-up.
